title: Shāhzādpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Shāhzādpur, with a Z-Score of +3.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Shāhzādpur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 83%, and the wind speed is 4.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
